ui.hero.sub: Vozen reads your Discord chat out loud with natural neural voices — in 35 languages, with games, laughter and a core that's free forever.
ui.hear.title: Press play. That's a real Vozen voice.
ui.hear.sub: Every clip is generated by Vozen itself. Switch engines to compare Google, Piper and Kokoro.
ui.feat.title: Everything your server needs
ui.feat.sub: One bot. Every voice feature you wished Discord had — and the core is free forever.
ui.feat.1.d: Pick a channel and Vozen reads every message out loud. Set it up once with /setup.
ui.feat.2.d: Every member picks their own voice from 35 languages — Google or a local neural engine.
ui.feat.3.d: Detects the language of each message, mixes voices inside one sentence, and gets louder when you use ! or CAPS.
ui.feat.4.d: Guess the language, spelling bees, Wordle, reflex duels — with a server leaderboard.
ui.feat.5.d: Greets people who join — without repeating itself — wishes happy birthday, tells jokes, answers the magic 8-ball, and tracks your server's top speakers.
ui.feat.6.d: Blocklists, rate limits, an anti-spam filter that mutes flooded messages, role gating, opt-out and a kill-switch. You stay in control.
ui.feat.7.d: Robot, echo, deep, chipmunk, radio, demon… your messages, transformed. Two effects free, all eight with Premium.
ui.feat.8.d: €3.99/month unlocks the extras. Everything that's free today stays free — that's a promise, not a trick.
ui.feat.9.d: All of Vozen's code is public on GitHub. Audit it, learn from it, or open a PR — no secrets, no spyware.
ui.lang.title: One server, every language.
ui.lang.sub: Vozen speaks 35+ languages. Everyone picks their own voice — Portuguese, English, Japanese, Arabic and more — with the names shown in their own language.
ui.lang.t3: Voice names localized to each user
ui.games.title: Play it out loud.
ui.games.sub: 16 minigames built for voice: a turn-based word chain in your language (Vozen reads each word aloud), guess the spoken language, decode super-fast speech, spelling bees, reflex duels, plus Wordle, hangman, tic-tac-toe and chess on real graphical boards. Every server keeps a leaderboard.
ui.games.t3: Vozen announces the winner out loud

voice: How Vozen calls you out loud
Teach Vozen how to say a word (yours only)
fun: A short joke in any language
Vozen picks one option at random and says it
admin: Greet people who join the call

faq: Yes — the core is free forever: all 38 voices in 35 languages, auto-read, greetings, most of the games and every admin control. Vozen Premium (from €3.99/month) only adds optional extras — the full voice-effect pack, voice cloning, 24/7 in-call, /rizz and three of the sixteen games. Nothing you already use moves behind a paywall.

All 8 voice effects (deep, demon, radio, underwater…), voice cloning, 24/7 in-call, 50 personal pronunciations, the /rizz command and the premium games (Word Chain, Wordle, Chess). €3.99/month covers 3 servers, or €7.99/month covers 10 (Premium Max); annual saves ~20%. Vozen Plus (€1.99/month) gives the same perks personally, on any server. Redeem codes with /premium activate.
How do I add Vozen to my server?
Click "Add to Discord", pick your server (you need Manage Server), and run /setup. That's it.
35 languages with 38 neural voices — Portuguese, English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Arabic, Russian and many more, each with a native voice.
Do I need to configure anything?
No. /setup does it in one step. After that, everything works with sensible defaults — you can fine-tune later with /config.
Can everyone have a different voice?
Yes. Each member sets their own voice and language with /voice set, and Vozen can even detect the language of each message automatically.
Google or Piper — which voice engine?

Both are free. Google (the default) covers all 35 languages instantly; Piper runs on our own server and often sounds better in some languages, like Portuguese. Switch anytime with /voice set — it's per-person.
How do I turn features off?
Everything is toggleable via /config — the greeting, auto-read, who-said announcements, the anti-spam filter, and more. There's also a full kill-switch.
